name: EZPAWN
description_short: North Riverside, IL's EZPAWN at 7361 W 25th St provides fast pawn loans, jewelry buying, and retail merchandise sales with extended weekday hours.
description_long:
EZPAWN at 7361 W 25th St is a standalone pawn shop in North Riverside, IL, located in a commercial area serving the western Chicago suburbs. The North Riverside location opens at 9 AM on weekdays, stays open until 8 PM Monday through Friday, operates Saturday hours from 9 AM to 7 PM, and is open Sunday from noon to 5 PM. This full-service pawn shop handles cash loans on personal items, buys used jewelry and electronics, and stocks a rotating inventory of retail merchandise.

At this North Riverside, IL EZPAWN, you can secure fast pawn loans by offering items as collateral—jewelry, electronics, tools, musical instruments, and more. The store staff can provide quotes over the phone at +1 708-442-5700 or in person, and they handle both collateral loans and direct merchandise purchases. Whether you need quick cash or want to sell items, this location handles transactions efficiently during posted hours.

If you're a North Riverside resident or work nearby on the west side, bring a valid government-issued ID for any transaction at this EZPAWN location. Pawn shops serve as a quick alternative to traditional lending for those needing immediate cash. Weekday hours extend to 8 PM, making after-work visits convenient.
pros: Instant cash loans based on collateral value, not credit score or employment verification
Instant Quote tool provides online estimates for electronics before visiting the store
EZ+ Rewards Program tracks points across pawn, redemption, sale, and purchase transactions with online account management
Extended store hours (9am-7pm weekdays and Saturday, 12pm-5pm Sunday) including weekend availability
Expert appraisal services for firearms and precious metals with secure on-site firearm storage
Flexible payment options including layaway (10% down with monthly payments) and Take Today (up to 12 months)
Significant discounts on pre-owned retail merchandise (25-70% off new prices) with daily new arrivals
Jewelry VIP Program offering guaranteed loan amounts, 100% trade-up values, and free cleaning/repairs
cons: Pawn loans carry high effective annual interest rates when calculated, though specific rates not disclosed on website
Risk of losing collateral permanently if unable to repay loan within specified timeframe
Firearm redemption subject to federal background checks, adding delays and potential denial of retrieval
Online payment options explicitly unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Service quality and loan amounts dependent on individual store location discretion ('at sole discretion of each location')
best_for: Consumers with poor credit or no credit history needing immediate cash secured by personal collateral
Individuals looking to sell used electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms for quick cash
Budget-conscious shoppers seeking significant discounts (25-70% off) on quality pre-owned brand-name merchandise
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable collateral (electronics, jewelry, firearms, tools) and lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans function as short-term, high-cost borrowing secured by personal assets—customers risk losing their items if unable to repay, and the effective annual interest rate is typically much higher than traditional loans, though specific APR is not disclosed on the website.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal collateral with immediate cash disbursement
Gold and diamond jewelry buying and appraisal services
Firearms loans, purchases, and secure on-site storage with background check redemption
Retail merchandise sales (pre-owned electronics, tools, jewelry, gaming, music equipment)
Layaway purchases with 10% down and monthly payment options
Take Today flexible payment plans (up to 12 months) through third-party partners
Product Protection Plans for electronics, computers, and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
EZ+ Rewards Program with online account management for pawn extensions and layaways
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Online shop with daily new arrivals and remote browsing
In-store cash transactions for pawn, sales, and jewelry purchases
meta_description: North Riverside, IL pawn shop EZPAWN at 7361 W 25th St offers fast pawn loans and jewelry buying with convenient evening hours.
